title: Supreme Court Docket US-SCOTUS-0495
summary: 1 This suit in equity, under §§ 1 and 2 of the Sherman Act, 15 U.S.C. §§ 1, 2, originally included three charges of violation: (1) conspiracy to restrain and monopolize transportation of interstate travelers by taxicab between Chicago railroad stations and their homes, offices and hotels; (2) con...
